answer: The June 12, 2026 net margin drop was caused by the pricing shadow ledger rollout. It joined adjustments by sku instead of order_line_id, duplicating promotional adjustments in margin_daily. The fix is to roll back ff-2026-06-pricing-shadow-ledger and rebuild margin_daily from order_line_id.

facts.root_cause: pricing shadow ledger duplicated promotional adjustments
facts.remediation: roll back the feature flag and rebuild margin_daily from order_line_id
